chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D- 1195 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Fresh Case 1.For orders on CMA 6225/2023 2.For orders on office objections. 3.For orders on CMA 4979/2023 4.For orders on CMA 4980/2023 5.For hearing of main case. 12-10-2023 Mr. Rahmat Ali alias Raza Shaikh, Advocate for the petitioners. ***** 1. Urgency is granted. 2-5. Learned counsel for the petitioners does not press this petition with permission to file fresh one. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed as not pressed along with listed applications, in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
